xiaomiTts.style.label: Default Style
xiaomiTts.style.placeholder: e.g. 开心, 东北话, 悄悄话 (free-form)
xiaomiTts.style.helper: Default style applied to auto-TTS and the tts_speak tool. Supports custom values beyond the preset list.
browser.title: Browser Automation (agent-browser)
browser.description: Control a real browser via the agent-browser CLI
browser.binPathHelper: Default: agent-browser (must be on PATH). Install with: npm i -g agent-browser
browser.cdp.helper: Connect to an existing Chrome via Chrome DevTools Protocol instead of launching agent-browser.
advanced.webSearchDescription: Enable Xiaomi server-side web_search tool; model decides when to search
advanced.webSearchForceDescription: Trigger search on every request instead of letting the model decide
banner.restartRequired.title: Restart required
banner.restartRequired.description: Configuration saved. Please restart OpenMantis manually for changes to take effect.
dialog.resetConfirmDescription: This will reset all {section} settings to their default values. This action cannot be undone.
dialog.restartConfirmDescription: Restarting will interrupt all ongoing conversations. Are you sure you want to continue?
